# MLRecommender.SimilarityType.pearson

**Case**

The Pearson correlation similarity measure.

## Declaration

```swift
case pearson
```

## Discussion

Use Pearson correlation similarity for comparing item ratings.

## Similarity types

- **MLRecommender.SimilarityType.jaccard**: The Jaccard similarity measure.
- **MLRecommender.SimilarityType.cosine**: The cosine similarity measure.
title: MLRecommender.SimilarityType.pearson
